item.name: 2. Workflow Administration
item.description: Run 'Login as Admin' in section 1 first.

exec: const r = pm.response.json(); pm.environment.set('token', r.token); pm.environment.set('admin_id', r.userId);
const r = pm.response.json(); pm.environment.set('template_id', r.id);

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Expense Report Approval",
  "description": "For all employee expense submissions",
  "steps": [
    {
      "stepOrder": 1,
      "parallelGroup": null,
      "name": "Manager Approval",
      "approverType": "USER",
      "approverId": "{{manager_id}}",
      "approvalMode": "ANY_OF",
      "timeoutHours": null,
      "escalationUserId": null,
      "conditions": []
    },
    {
      "stepOrder": 2,
      "parallelGroup": null,
      "name": "Finance Approval",
      "approverType": "USER",
      "approverId": "{{finance_id}}",
      "approvalMode": "ANY_OF",
      "timeoutHours": null,
      "escalationUserId": null,
      "conditions": [
        {
          "fieldName": "amount",
          "operator": "GT",
          "value": "5000"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "stepOrder": 3,
      "parallelGroup": null,
      "name": "VP Approval",
      "approverType": "USER",
      "approverId": "{{vp_id}}",
      "approvalMode": "ANY_OF",
      "timeoutHours": null,
      "escalationUserId": null,
      "conditions": [
        {
          "fieldName": "amount",
          "operator": "GT",
          "value": "10000"
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}

{
  "name": "Expense Report Approval (Updated)",

item.name: 6. Parallel Approval

  "name": "Escalation Demo Workflow",
  "description": "Manager review — escalates to VP after 60 seconds if not actioned",

      "stepOrder": 1,
      "parallelGroup": null,
      "name": "Manager Review",
      "approverType": "USER",
      "approverId": "{{manager_id}}",
      "approvalMode": "ANY_OF",
      "timeoutHours": 1,
      "escalationUserId": "{{vp_id}}",
      "conditions": []
    }
  ]
}
